recommendations.title: Windfall
recommendations.overview: In an opulent vacation home, a mysterious intruder is forced to kidnap the property owners -- a wealthy CEO and his wife -- when they arrive unexpectedly.

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: Dial M for Murder
recommendations.overview: When her American lover visits London, a wealthy woman’s jealous husband hatches a plan to murder her and inherit her fortune.

recommendations.title: Neighborhood Watch
recommendations.overview: When a mentally ill young man thinks he witnesses an abduction and the police refuse to believe him, he reluctantly turns to his next door neighbor – a bitter, retired security guard – to help him find the missing woman.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: Georgekutty lives a happy life with his wife and daughters. Things take a turn when his daughter gets indecently filmed using a hidden camera, by the son of a police inspector.

recommendations.title: The Seven-Ups
recommendations.overview: A tough detective who is part of an elite New York City unit is trying to find out who killed his partner, but uncovers a plot to kidnap mobsters for money.

recommendations.title: In Her Skin
recommendations.overview: Tale of a 15-year-old Australian girl who went missing.

recommendations.title: Wake Wood
recommendations.overview: The parents of a girl who was killed by a savage dog are granted the opportunity to spend three days with their deceased daughter.

recommendations.title: Hindi Medium
recommendations.overview: Mita and Raj Batra, an affluent couple from Delhi’s Chandni Chowk, are grappling with getting their daughter admission into an English medium school. But there is one big problem. Their zubaan is Hindi, and the elitist snobs won’t let the Hindi speak

recommendations.title: Fur: An Imaginary Portrait of Diane Arbus
